title: Create: Molten Metals
description: Melt down metals, cast ingots and engage in metallurgy with Create: Molten Metals
body:
# MELT DOWN YOUR ORES
Do you have a Tinkers' Construct shaped hole in your heart? Why not fill it up with some Molten Lead!

Create: Molten Metals is a lightweight create addon with one goal in mind: let you melt down metals and and pour them back out into ingot molds. With a significant (and ever expanding!) list of compatible mods, this is the best place to go for modpackers looking to create an expert experience through the power of Molten Metals.

## List of currently supported metals:

### Iron
![iron mold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fc47536f5df7a8e219693ceeab03928be63a849.png)
